latin: Jonathan per portas castelli intravit. Comes Dracula eum salutavit: 'intrate libere et ex propria voluntate!' risus eius frigidus erat. muri castelli umbrarum pleni erant.

questions.prompt: What does Dracula say to Jonathan?
questions.target: Enter freely and of your own will
choices: Enter freely and of your own will

translation: Jonathan entered through the gates of the castle. Count Dracula greeted him: 'Enter freely and of your own will!' His laugh was cold. The walls of the castle were full of shadows.
